testcase.name: testLexerErrorThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 13:39:03.639 [main] ERROR uk.ac.bham.codeclassroom.generator.api.GenerationService -- Runtime exception during project generation pipeline testcase.name: testValidCDLGeneratesZip
testcase.system-out: 13:39:03.650 [main] INFO uk.ac.bham.codeclassroom.generator.jhipster.fullstack.FullStackGenerationPipeline -- Debugging [Pipeline]: Listing all .java files under /var/folders/7z/s9d026g95y7f43pxjddrxz700000gn/T/codeclassroom-gen-1425247846193184076/build/generated-app/src/main/java 13:39:03.651 [main] INFO uk.ac.bham.codeclassroom.generator.jhipster.fullstack.FullStackGenerationPipeline -- Generated file: uk/ac/bham/codeclassroom/service/dto/StudentDTO.java 13:39:03.651 [main] INFO uk.ac.bham.codeclassroom.generator.jhipster.fullstack.FullStackGenerationPipeline -- Generated file: uk/ac/bham/codeclassroom/service/mapper/StudentMapper.java 13:39:03.651 [main] INFO uk.ac.bham.codeclassroom.generator.jhipster.fullstack.FullStackGenerationPipeline -- Generated file: uk/ac/bham/codeclassroom/domain/Person.java 13:39:03.651 [main] INFO uk.ac.bham.codeclassroom.generator.jhipster.fullstack.FullStackGenerationPipeline -- Generated file: uk/ac/bham/codeclassroom/domain/Student.java
